---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for BreakFree
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What user need does it address?
_e.g. "As a BreakFree user, I find it difficult to track my progress because..."_

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternative Solutions Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why did you prefer the proposed solution?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Mockups / Examples

If you have wireframes, mockups, or examples from other apps, attach or link them here.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

## Impact

- **Affected area**: (e.g. Dashboard, Onboarding, Notifications, Auth)
- **User type**: (e.g. new users, power users, coaches)
- **Priority estimate**: Low / Medium / High
